title: rosa communis subvar. nitens
intro: Rosa communis subvar. nitens, also known as the Shining Dog Rose or Common Dog Rose, is a species of rose that belongs to the Rosa communis group. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, as well as its ability to act as a natural antiseptic and astringent. The health benefits of Rosa communis subvar. nitens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Rosa communis subvar. nitens is often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, and can be used externally to treat skin conditions and wounds.
